settings.title: Settings
settings.profileDesc: Manage your personal information and account details
settings.securityDesc: Manage passwords, two-factor authentication, and security settings
settings.notificationsDesc: Configure email, push, and in-app notification preferences
settings.productivityDesc: Customize your workflow with keyboard shortcuts and task management
settings.privacyDesc: Control your data privacy and visibility settings
settings.appearanceDesc: Customize theme, colors, and visual preferences
settings.regionalDesc: Set your language, timezone, and date format preferences
settings.dashboardDesc: Customize your dashboard layout and widgets
settings.integrationsDesc: Connect with third-party apps and services
settings.billingDesc: Manage your subscription, payment methods, and invoices

settingsExtended.customizeInterface: Customize your interface appearance and theme
settingsExtended.chooseAccentColor: Choose your preferred accent color (coming soon)

settingsProfile.updateDetails: Update your personal details and profile picture
settingsProfile.clickToUpload: Click the camera icon to upload a new avatar

settingsSecurity.touchIdDesc: Register biometric authentication for quick and secure login
settingsSecurity.touchIdEnable: Enable Touch ID or fingerprint for faster and more secure login
settingsSecurity.faceIdDesc: Register your face for secure facial recognition login
settingsSecurity.removeFaceIdConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove Face ID registration?
settingsSecurity.registerFaceDesc: Register your face to enable quick and secure login with Face ID

settingsLocalization.customizeLanguage: Customize your language and regional preferences
settingsLocalization.configureDatetime: Configure how dates and times are displayed
settingsLocalization.weekStartNote: This affects your calendar, reports, and analytics views

settingsProductivity.focusModeDesc: Minimize distractions and stay focused on your work
settingsProductivity.focusModeHelp: When enabled, notifications will be muted and distractions minimized
settingsProductivity.breakRemindersDesc: Get reminded to take breaks at regular intervals
settingsProductivity.breakReminderMessage: Time for a break! Remember to stretch and rest your eyes.
settingsProductivity.getReminded: Get reminded to take breaks and stretch
settingsProductivity.setTargets: Set productivity targets to stay motivated
settingsProductivity.tasksPerDay: Number of tasks to complete per day
settingsProductivity.keyboardShortcutsDesc: Use keyboard shortcuts to navigate faster

settingsNotifications.title: Notification Settings
settingsNotifications.description: Manage how and when you receive notifications
settingsNotifications.pushNotificationsDesc: Receive push notifications in your browser
settingsNotifications.weeklyReportDesc: Get a weekly summary of your activities via email

settingsIntegration.automatedReportsDesc: Send weekly summary reports to your email every Monday
settingsIntegration.weeklySummary: Weekly Summary: Every Monday at 9:00 AM
settingsIntegration.googleCalendarDesc: Sync leave requests with Google Calendar
settingsIntegration.outlookCalendarDesc: Sync your leave schedule with Microsoft Outlook
settingsIntegration.sharepointSyncDesc: Sync employee list from SharePoint to keep your team roster up to date
settingsIntegration.sharepointAutoSync: Automatically sync employees from your SharePoint List
settingsIntegration.microsoftTeamsDesc: Sync notifications with Microsoft Teams channels
settingsIntegration.slackDesc: Connect your Slack workspace for instant notifications
settingsIntegration.title: Integrations
settingsIntegration.googleCalendarError: Failed to connect Google Calendar. Please try again.
settingsIntegration.googleNotConfigured: Google Calendar integration is not configured. Please contact your administrator.
settingsIntegration.disconnectError: Failed to disconnect. Please try again.

settingsAdvancedSecurity.twoFactorDesc: Add an extra layer of security to your account
settingsAdvancedSecurity.enable2faDesc: Require a verification code in addition to your password
settingsAdvancedSecurity.activeSessionsDesc: Manage devices currently logged into your account
settingsAdvancedSecurity.loginAlertsDesc: Get notified when someone logs into your account
settingsAdvancedSecurity.securityTipDesc: Use a strong, unique password and enable 2FA for maximum security. Regularly review your login history for any suspicious activity.

settingsDashboard.defaultLandingPageDesc: Choose which page to show after login
settingsDashboard.quickStatisticsDesc: Display key metrics and numbers at a glance
settingsDashboard.leaveCalendarDesc: View team leave schedule in calendar format
settingsDashboard.upcomingTasksDesc: Show tasks that are due soon
settingsDashboard.analyticsChartDesc: Visual representation of HR analytics data
settingsDashboard.compactModeDesc: Reduce spacing for more compact layout
settingsDashboard.dashboardWidgetsDesc: Choose which widgets appear on your dashboard

focusMode.title: Focus Mode
focusMode.statusBusy: Status set to Busy. Notifications muted.
focusMode.stayFocused: 💪 Stay focused and crush your goals!

pomodoro.pomodoroCompleted: Pomodoro completed! 🎉 Time for a break!
pomodoro.breakReadyMsg: Great work! Time for a 5-minute break.
pomodoro.refreshedMsg: Feeling refreshed? Ready to focus again?
pomodoro.goalsMsg: Time to get back to crushing your goals!
pomodoro.productivityTip: 💡 25 min focus + 5 min break = peak productivity
